mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_notification (member_id, sender_id, noti_type, target_type, target_id, message) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{senderId}, #{notiType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{message})
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.sender_id, m.nickname AS sender_nickname, m.profile_image AS sender_profile_image, n.noti_type, n.target_type, n.target_id, CASE WHEN n.target_type = 'MESSAGE' THEN message_target.message_room_id ELSE NULL END AS message_room_id, n.message, n.is_read, n.created_datetime FROM tbl_notification n LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON n.sender_id = m.id LEFT JOIN tbl_message message_target ON n.target_type = 'MESSAGE' AND n.target_id = message_target.id WHERE n.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY n.created_datetime DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_notification WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_read = false
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_notification SET is_read = true WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_read = false
